notes: Strong security posture with helmet, CORS, rate limiting, input sanitization via escape(), body size limit, and UUID validation. No auth mechanism but task didn't require it. Error handling has a bug: malformed JSON bodies hit the global error handler and return 500 instead of 400 because the global handler doesn't differentiate error types. Validation chains for title/description are duplicated across POST/PUT/PATCH instead of being extracted into reusable constants. No graceful shutdown (SIGTERM/SIGINT), no memory bounds on in-memory storage, PORT env var parsed with parseInt but never validated for NaN or valid port range, no health check endpoint, no request timeout configuration.
